criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence for music creation or enhancement.

criteria.name: User Accessibility
criteria.description: Ease of use and accessibility for users of varying skill levels.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and quality of features offered for music creation or editing.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different operating systems and devices.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: Pricing structure, including free versions, subscriptions, or one-time purchases.
